titles.text: Gintama: Gintoki vs. Hijikata!? Kabukichou Gintama Dai-soudatsusen!!
銀魂 銀時vs土方!? かぶき町銀玉大争奪戦!!

descriptions.text: Gintama: Gintoki vs Hijikata!? Kabukichou Gintama Dai Soudatsusen!! is a Japan‑exclusive Nintendo DS action‑adventure game based on the popular Gintama manga and anime series. Developed and published by Banpresto, it features a comedic storyline in which protagonists Gintoki Sakata and Toshiro Hijikata face off in a chaotic competition set in Kabukichou. Players engage in a mix of mini‑games, battles, and interactive story sequences faithful to the series’ humor and characters.
